problem_statement:
<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at main -->

## What's Changed
### 🚀 New Features and Enhancements
* output: checkout: use f-string by @skshetry in https://github.com/iterative/dvc/pull/9715
* fetch: introduce --type metrics/plots by @efiop in https://github.com/iterative/dvc/pull/9718
### 🐛 Bug Fixes
* repro:  ignore --downstream if used together with --pipeline by @skshetry in https://github.com/iterative/dvc/pull/9692
### Other Changes
* api.get_url: use index storage for getting remote URL by @pmrowla in https://github.com/iterative/dvc/pull/9676
* repo: site_cache_dir: take major version into account by @efiop in https://github.com/iterative/dvc/pull/9699
* readme: point to dvc.org for packages by @efiop in https://github.com/iterative/dvc/pull/9703
* update link for external data sources by @dberenbaum in https://github.com/iterative/dvc/pull/9706
* output: fix formatting by @efiop in https://github.com/iterative/dvc/pull/9716
* output: pass explicit callback to hashfile.build() by @efiop in https://github.com/iterative/dvc/pull/9714
* deps: bump dvc-data to 2.5.0 by @efiop in https://github.com/iterative/dvc/pull/9717


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/iterative/dvc/compare/3.4.0...3.5.0
